sutta: the buddha said monks these 4 persons are found existing in the world what for he who is in darkness and bound for darkness he who is in darkness but bound for light he who is in light but bound for darkness and he who is in light and bound for light and how monks is a person in darkness bound for darkness in this case a certain person is born in a low family the family of a scavenger or a hunter or a basket weaver or wheel right or sweeper or in the family of some wretched man hard put hard put to it to find a meal or earn a living where food and clothes are hard to get moreover he is ill-favored ugly dwarfish sickly half-blind crooked lame or paralyzed with hardly any food without clothes vehicle without perfumes or flower garlands bed dwelling or lights he lives in the practice of doing evil with body speech and mind and so doing when body breaks up after death he is reborn in the waste the woeful plains the downfall in hell thus monks is the person who is in darkness and bound for darkness and how mums is a person in darkness but bound for life in this case a certain person is born in a low family the family of a scavenger or a hunter or a basket weaver etc etc as before he lives in the practice of doing good with body speech and mind and so doing when body breaks up after death is reborn in the happy lord in the heaven world [Music] and how monks is a person in light but bound for darkness in this case a certain person is born in a high family a family of wealthy nobles or a family of wealthy brahmins or of wealthy householders in a family that is rich exceedingly rich of great possessions with the support of abounding wealth in a family that abounds in wealth of crops and that man is well built comely and charming possessed of supreme beauty of form he is 1 able to get clothes vehicle perfumes and flower garlands bed dwelling and lights but he lives in the practice of doing evil with body speech and thought so doing when body breaks up after death he is reborn in the ways the woeful planes the downfall in hell thus monks is the person who is in light but bound for darkness and how monks is a person who is in light and bound for light in this case a person is born in a high family [Music] a family of wealthy nobles or a family of wealthy brahmins or of wealthy householders in a family that is rich exceedingly rich or great possessions etc etc he lives in the practice of doing good with body speech and mind so doing when body breaks up after death he is reborn in the happy lord in the heaven world thus monks is 1 who is in light and bound for light these monks are the 4 persons found existing in the world so in this utah you see different kinds of people in this world there are some who are because of bad karma they are born in a low family where life is difficult and physically also they they look ugly and they hardly get food etc and in spite of that now because they don't know the dharma nobody taught them the dharma they do evil they're having a uh bad life and still they do evil and because of that now they will go down to the woeful planes the 3 woeful planes uh the animal realm or ghosts or hell but the second type of person he's born to a poor family despise etc but he because of good conditions he does good good karmas of body speech and mind so because of doing good he is perhaps he comes across the dhamma and the dhamma teaches him to live a righteous life a good life man so he does good karma and after that he is born in a in heaven or at least in the human realm or something this is in a better condition than before then the third 1 is a person in light but bound for darkness that means that person was born to a rich family and then he is also endowed with good physical features he's healthy strong and good looking etc but he does evil and does evil deeds and this is this quite common people who have come from a rich family they have power they have money and they misuse it they try to enjoy life too much get the most out of life and so later they'll have to suffer and go to the woeful planes but the fourth 1 is extremely good he's got good karma point a good family and he takes the trouble to study the the dhamma listen to the sutas and so he guides himself on the right course he uses his wealth to do meritorious deeds so he's planting the good karma so that the next life he'll be reborn into a very good life again so we have to remember the suta which i read earlier also which where the buddha said few beings a few human beings will come back to the human plane or be born into the deva realm most human beings when we pass away most of us maybe 70 80 percent of human beings will be born into the woeful plains but that is that figure is just a speculation will be born to the warfare planes and not many will be reborn in the human realm and the day of arya so because of that now we have to be very careful don't live an ordinary life like most people don't don't be an ordinary person because the ordinary person doesn't get a good reaper we have to get a good make the best out of life and then we'll get a good reaper make the best of life not meaning in sensual enjoyment but in the dharma sense [Music] now we come across a suitable is a bit technical i've got to do about meditation
